title: AI Usage & Service Pricing Strategy Guide
description: A practical guide helping automation freelancers and agencies structure pricing models for n8n workflows, including strategies for charging development fees, AI token usage, and ongoing service fees.
gumroad_description:
You built the automation. Now you have no idea what to charge for it.

This guide cuts through the confusion around pricing n8n workflows and AI-powered services — covering one-time build fees, token usage pass-throughs, retainer structures, and how to package ongoing maintenance without undercharging.

Who this is for:
— Freelancers quoting their first n8n project and guessing at numbers
— Agency owners adding AI automation to their service stack
— Consultants getting asked "what does the AI part cost?" with no clean answer

What's inside:
— A pricing framework covering build fees, AI usage costs, and recurring service tiers
— Real approaches for handling token costs without eating the margin
— Retainer and maintenance structures you can adapt immediately
— A quick-reference summary you can keep open during client calls

This is an ~800-word focused guide in Markdown. No padding, no theory — just the structure you need to quote confidently and protect your margins.

If you're tired of undercharging or losing deals because your pricing looks cobbled together, this is the fix.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
